message.content:
You are working on beads issue kapow-6n8.3: Add expect arrays to all demo steps.

## Task
Add `expect` arrays to each of the 16 steps in `web/demo/steps.ts` — only the elements necessary for that step to be considered working.

## Context
- The `ElementCheck` type and `expect` field already exist in `web/demo/types.ts`:
```typescript
export interface ElementCheck {
  selector: string
  label: string
}

export interface DemoStep {
  title: string
  description: string
  action: (page: Page) => Promise<void>
  expect?: ElementCheck[]
}
```

- `web/demo/steps.ts` has 16 steps. Each step needs an `expect` array with CSS selectors and labels for elements that should be visible after that step's action runs.

## Guidelines for expect arrays
- Keep them minimal — only the elements that MUST be present for the step to be "working"
- Use CSS selectors that match real elements in the app
- Study the action code for each step to understand what elements should be visible after it runs
- Study the actual frontend components in `web/src/` to find correct selectors
- Labels should be human-readable descriptions of what's being checked

### Example for step 1 (Welcome):
```typescript
expect: [
  { selector: 'h1', label: 'Hero heading' },
  { selector: 'input[type="search"]', label: 'Search input' },
]
```

## Important
- Look at the existing frontend code to understand the real selectors
- Don't over-specify — 2-4 checks per step is usually sufficient
- Make sure selectors are robust (not too fragile)

## Quality Gate
After editing the file, run:
```bash
cd web && pnpm build && pnpm lint
```
Both must pass with zero errors/warnings.

## Git
- Commit your changes with a descriptive message
- Branch: worktree/demo-expects

   328→  const handleToggleColumn = useCallback((fieldName: string) => {

   454→  function handleFilterChange(fieldName: string, value: unknown | undefined) {

   521→              next.set('sortDir', 'DESC')
   522→            } else {
   523→              // DESC → clear
   524→              next.delete('sort')
   525→              next.delete('sortDir')
   526→            }
   527→          } else {
   528→            // New field → ASC
   529→            next.set('sort', field)
   530→            next.delete('sortDir')
   531→          }
   532→          next.delete('page')
   533→          return next
   534→        },
   535→        { replace: true },
   536→      )
   537→    },
   538→    [setSearchParams],
   539→  )
   540→
   541→  const handleBlendChange = useCallback(
   542→    (weights: Record<string, number>) => {
   543→      setSearchParams(
   544→        (prev) => {
   545→          const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   546→          const serialized = serializeBlendWeights(weights)
   547→          if (serialized) {
   548→            next.set('blend', serialized)
   549→            // Clear sort when blend is active — blend determines ordering
   550→            next.delete('sort')
   551→            next.delete('sortDir')
   552→          } else {
   553→            next.delete('blend')
   554→          }
   555→          next.delete('page')
   556→          return next
   557→        },
   558→        { replace: true },
   559→      )
   560→    },
   561→    [setSearchParams],
   562→  )
   563→
   564→  function handlePageChange(newPage: number) {
   565→    setSearchParams(
   566→      (prev) => {
   567→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   568→        if (newPage <= 1) {
   569→          next.delete('page')
   570→        } else {
   571→          next.set('page', String(newPage))
   572→        }
   573→        return next
   574→      },
   575→      { replace: true },
   576→    )
   577→  }
   578→
   579→  function handlePageSizeChange(newSize: number) {
   580→    setSearchParams(
   581→      (prev) => {
   582→        const next = new URLSearchParams(prev)
   583→        if (newSize === DEFAULT_PAGE_SIZE) {
   584→          next.delete('pageSize')
   585→        } else {
   586→          next.set('pageSize', String(newSize))
   587→        }
   588→        next.delete('page')
   589→        return next
   590→      },
   591→      { replace: true },
   592→    )
   593→  }
   594→
   595→  const handleExportCsv = useCallback(() => {
   596→    const params = new URLSearchParams()
   597→    const filterInputs = buildFilterInputs(filters)
   598→    if (filterInputs.length > 0) {
   599→      params.set('filters', JSON.stringify(filterInputs))
   600→    }
   601→    if (sort) {
   602→      params.set('sort', sort.field)
   603→    }
   604→    if (userLocation) {
   605→      params.set('userLat', String(userLocation.latitude))
   606→      params.set('userLng', String(userLocation.longitude))
   607→      if (userLocation.state) {
   608→        params.set('userState', userLocation.state)
   609→      }
   610→    }
   611→    window.open(`/api/export/csv?${params.toString()}`, '_blank')
   612→  }, [filters, sort, userLocation])
   613→
   614→  const handleExportPdf = useCallback(() => {
   615→    const activeFilters = fields
   616→      .filter((f) => filters[f.name] !== undefined)
   617→      .map((f) => f.label)
   618→    downloadSearchPdf({
   619→      institutions,
   620→      outputFields: allOutputFields,
   621→      activeFilters,
   622→      maxRows: MAX_RESULTS,
   623→      dataSources,
   624→    })
   625→  }, [institutions, allOutputFields, fields, filters, dataSources])
   626→
   627→  const filterContent = (
   628→    <>
   629→      <Title order={6} tt="uppercase" fz="xs" fw={600} lts="0.05em" c="brand.9" mb="md">
   630→        Filters
   631→      </Title>
   632→
   633→      <Box mb="md">
   634→        <Text size="xs" fw={600} tt="uppercase" lts="0.05em" c="dimmed" mb="xs">
   635→          Your Location
   636→        </Text>
   637→        <LocationInput
   638→          value={
   639→            userLocation
   640→              ? {
   641→                  latitude: userLocation.latitude,
   642→                  longitude: userLocation.longitude,
   643→                  state: userLocation.state,
   644→                }
   645→              : undefined
   646→          }
   647→          onChange={handleLocationChange}
   648→        />
   649→      </Box>
   650→
   651→      <Box mb="md">
   652→        <RankingBlendBuilder
   653→          weights={blendWeights}
   654→          onChange={handleBlendChange}

   657→      </Box>
   658→
   659→      {fieldsResult.fetching && (
   660→        <Text size="sm" c="dimmed">
   661→          Loading filters…
   662→        </Text>
   663→      )}
   664→      {fieldsResult.error && (

   667→        </Text>
   668→      )}
   669→      {themeGroups.map((group) => (

   671→          <Text size="xs" fw={600} tt="uppercase" lts="0.05em" c="dimmed" mb="xs">

   674→          {group.fields.map((field) => (

   680→              dataSources={dataSources}
   681→            />
   682→          ))}
   683→        </Box>
   684→      ))}
   685→    </>
   686→  )
   687→
   688→  return (
   689→    <Box component="main" style={{ display: 'flex', flex: 1, flexDirection: 'column' }}>
   690→      <Container size="xl" px="md" py="md" style={{ display: 'flex', flex: 1 }}>
   691→        <Flex
   692→          direction={{ base: 'column', md: 'row' }}
   693→          gap={0}
   694→          style={{ flex: 1, width: '100%' }}
   695→        >
   696→          {/* Sidebar: on mobile, collapsible; on desktop, fixed-width aside */}
   697→          <Box
   698→            style={{
   699→              ...(isDesktop
   700→                ? {
   701→                    width: 280,
   702→                    flexShrink: 0,
   703→                    overflowY: 'auto',
   704→                    borderRight: '1px solid var(--mantine-color-gray-3)',
   705→                    paddingRight: 16,
   706→                  }
   707→                : {}),
   708→            }}
   709→          >
   710→            {!isDesktop && (
   711→              <Box mb="sm">
   712→                <Button
   713→                  variant="default"
   714→                  size="xs"

   717→                >
   718→                  {filtersOpened ? 'Hide Filters' : 'Show Filters'}
   719→                </Button>
   720→              </Box>

   722→
   723→            {isDesktop ? (
   724→              filterContent
   725→            ) : (
   726→              <Collapse in={filtersOpened}>
   727→                <Box
   728→                  mb="md"
   729→                  pb="md"

   731→                >
   732→                  {filterContent}
   733→                </Box>
   734→              </Collapse>
   735→            )}
   736→          </Box>
   737→
   738→          {/* Results section */}
   739→          <Box style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }} pl={{ base: 0, md: 'lg' }}>
   740→            <Group justify="space-between" mb="md" wrap="wrap" gap="sm">
   741→              <Title order={2} c="brand.9">

   781→
   782→            {searchResult.fetching && (

   789→            {searchResult.error && (

   799→            {!searchResult.fetching && searchResult.data && (

   805→                </Text>
   806→                {institutions.length === 0 ? (
   807→                  <Stack align="center" py="xl" gap="xs">

   814→                    >

   817→                  </Stack>
   818→                ) : viewMode === 'card' ? (
   819→                  <SimpleGrid cols={{ base: 1, sm: 2, lg: 3 }} spacing="md">
   820→                    {institutions.map((inst) => (
   821→                      <InstitutionCard
   822→                        key={inst.unitID}
   823→                        institution={inst}
   824→                        hasLocation={hasLocation}
   825→                        hasState={hasState}
   826→                        onClick={() => {
   827→                          setSelectedUnitID(inst.unitID)
   828→                          setDetailOpened(true)
   829→                        }}
   830→                      />
   831→                    ))}
   832→                  </SimpleGrid>
   833→                ) : viewMode === 'list' ? (
   834→                  <ResultsList
   835→                    institutions={institutions}
   836→                    hasLocation={hasLocation}
   837→                    hasState={hasState}
   838→                    onClickInstitution={(unitID) => {
   839→                      setSelectedUnitID(unitID)
   840→                      setDetailOpened(true)
   841→                    }}
   842→                  />
   843→                ) : viewMode === 'map' ? (
   844→                  <ResultsMap

   846→                    userLocation={userLocation ?? undefined}
   847→                    onClickInstitution={(unitID) => {
   848→                      setSelectedUnitID(unitID)
   849→                      setDetailOpened(true)
   850→                    }}
   851→                  />
   852→                ) : (
   853→                  <Box style={{ overflowX: 'auto' }}>
   854→                    <ResultsTable
   855→                      institutions={institutions}
   856→                      outputFields={allOutputFields}
   857→                      visibleColumns={visibleColumns}
   858→                      columnOrder={columnOrder}
   859→                      onClickInstitution={(unitID) => {

   861→                        setDetailOpened(true)
   862→                      }}
   863→                      hasLocation={hasLocation}
   864→                      hasState={hasState}
   865→                      hasBlend={hasBlend}
   866→                      sort={sort}
   867→                      onSort={handleSort}
   868→                      dataSources={dataSources}
   869→                    />
   870→                  </Box>
   871→                )}
   872→
   873→                {totalPages > 1 && (
   874→                  <Group gap="md" wrap="wrap" data-testid="pagination-controls">
   875→                    <Pagination total={totalPages} value={page} onChange={handlePageChange} />
   876→                    <Group gap="xs">
   877→                      <NativeSelect

   882→                        data={PAGE_SIZE_OPTIONS.map((size) => ({

   884→                          label: String(size),
   885→                        }))}
   886→                        size="xs"
   887→                        style={{ width: 70 }}
   888→                      />
   889→                      <Text component="label" htmlFor="page-size" fz="sm" c="dimmed">
   890→                        Per page
   891→                      </Text>
   892→                    </Group>
   893→                  </Group>
   894→                )}
   895→              </Stack>
   896→            )}
   897→          </Box>
   898→        </Flex>
   899→      </Container>
   900→
   901→      <InstitutionDetail
   902→        unitID={selectedUnitID}
   903→        opened={detailOpened}
   904→        onClose={() => setDetailOpened(false)}
   905→      />
   906→    </Box>
   907→  )
   908→}

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→import { Box, Button, Group, Paper, Slider, Stack, Text } from '@mantine/core'
     3→import type { SearchField } from './types'
     4→
     5→/** Ranking field metadata for the blend builder. */
     6→const RANKING_FIELDS = [
     7→  { field: 'rank_us_news_national', label: 'US News National' },
     8→  { field: 'rank_us_news_liberal_arts', label: 'US News Liberal Arts' },
     9→  { field: 'rank_forbes', label: 'Forbes' },
    10→  { field: 'rank_washington_monthly_national', label: 'Wash. Monthly National' },
    11→  { field: 'rank_washington_monthly_liberal_arts', label: 'Wash. Monthly L.A.' },
    12→  { field: 'rank_niche', label: 'Niche' },
    13→  { field: 'score_money', label: 'Money Score' },
    14→]
    15→
    16→interface RankingBlendBuilderProps {
    17→  weights: Record<string, number>
    18→  onChange: (weights: Record<string, number>) => void
    19→  /** Available search fields — used to filter to ranking fields that exist in the schema. */
    20→  fields?: SearchField[]
    21→}
    22→
    23→export function RankingBlendBuilder({ weights, onChange, fields }: RankingBlendBuilderProps) {
    24→  // Filter to ranking fields that actually exist in the field schema
    25→  const availableFields = useMemo(() => {
    26→    if (!fields || fields.length === 0) return RANKING_FIELDS
    27→    const fieldNames = new Set(fields.filter((f) => f.theme === 'RANKING').map((f) => f.name))
    28→    return RANKING_FIELDS.filter((rf) => fieldNames.has(rf.field))
    29→  }, [fields])
    30→
    31→  const totalWeight = useMemo(
    32→    () => Object.values(weights).reduce((sum, w) => sum + w, 0),
    33→    [weights],
    34→  )
    35→
    36→  const hasWeights = totalWeight > 0
    37→
    38→  function handleSliderChange(field: string, value: number) {
    39→    onChange({ ...weights, [field]: value })
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  function handleReset() {
    43→    onChange({})
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  return (
    47→    <Paper p="sm" withBorder data-testid="ranking-blend-builder">
    48→      <Text size="xs" fw={600} tt="uppercase" lts="0.05em" c="dimmed" mb="xs">
    49→        Custom Ranking Blend
    50→      </Text>
    51→
    52→      <Stack gap="xs">
    53→        {availableFields.map(({ field, label }) => {
    54→          const value = weights[field] ?? 0
    55→          const pct = totalWeight > 0 ? ((value / totalWeight) * 100).toFixed(0) : '0'
    56→
    57→          return (
    58→            <Box key={field} data-field={field}>
    59→              <Group justify="space-between" gap="xs" mb={2}>
    60→                <Text size="xs" fw={500}>
    61→                  {label}
    62→                </Text>
    63→                <Text size="xs" c="dimmed" miw={60} ta="right">
    64→                  {value > 0 ? `${value} (${pct}%)` : '0'}
    65→                </Text>
    66→              </Group>
    67→              <Slider
    68→                value={value}
    69→                onChange={(v) => handleSliderChange(field, v)}
    70→                min={0}
    71→                max={100}
    72→                step={5}
    73→                size="sm"
    74→                label={null}
    75→                aria-label={`${label} weight`}
    76→              />
    77→            </Box>
    78→          )
    79→        })}
    80→
    81→        {hasWeights && (
    82→          <Group justify="flex-end" mt="xs">
    83→            <Button variant="subtle" size="xs" onClick={handleReset}>
    84→              Reset
    85→            </Button>
    86→          </Group>
    87→        )}
    88→      </Stack>
    89→    </Paper>
    90→  )
    91→}

1→import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'
     2→import { graphql } from 'gql.tada'
     3→import { useQuery } from '@/lib/graphql'
     4→import { Card, Text, Box, Skeleton, Stack } from '@mantine/core'
     5→import type { SampleSearch } from './sampleSearches'
     6→
     7→export const SAMPLE_SEARCH_QUERY = graphql(`
     8→  query SampleSearch($filters: [FilterInput!], $limit: Int) {
     9→    search(filters: $filters, limit: $limit) {
    10→      results {
    11→        unitID
    12→        name
    13→        city
    14→        state
    15→      }
    16→      total
    17→    }
    18→  }

    20→
    21→export interface SampleSearchResult {

    24→    total: number
    25→  }
    26→}
    27→
    28→export function useSampleSearchQuery(filters: Array<{ field: string; value: unknown }>) {
    29→  return useQuery<SampleSearchResult>({

1→import { useRef, useState } from 'react'
     2→import {
     3→  ActionIcon,
     4→  Box,
     5→  Button,
     6→  Checkbox,
     7→  Divider,
     8→  Group,
     9→  Popover,
    10→  Stack,
    11→  Text,
    12→} from '@mantine/core'
    13→import { ArrowDown, ArrowUp, Columns, GripVertical } from 'lucide-react'
    14→
    15→import { outputFieldsByTheme } from './helpers'
    16→import type { SearchOutputField } from './types'
    17→
    18→interface ColumnPickerProps {
    19→  outputFields: SearchOutputField[]
    20→  visibleColumns: Set<string>
    21→  onToggleColumn: (fieldName: string) => void
    22→  columnOrder: string[]
    23→  onReorderColumn: (fieldName: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => void
    24→  onSetColumnOrder: (order: string[]) => void
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function ColumnPicker({
    28→  outputFields,
    29→  visibleColumns,
    30→  onToggleColumn,
    31→  columnOrder,
    32→  onReorderColumn,
    33→  onSetColumnOrder,
    34→}: ColumnPickerProps) {
    35→  const visibleFields = outputFields.filter((f) => f.visibility !== 'HIDDEN')
    36→  const groups = outputFieldsByTheme(visibleFields)
    37→
    38→  // Build ordered list of visible columns (excluding pinned "name") for the reorder section
    39→  const fieldsByName = new Map(outputFields.map((f) => [f.name, f]))
    40→  const orderedVisible = columnOrder.filter(
    41→    (name) => name !== 'name' && visibleColumns.has(name) && fieldsByName.has(name),
    42→  )
    43→
    44→  // Drag state
    45→  const dragItem = useRef<number | null>(null)
    46→  const dragOverItem = useRef<number | null>(null)
    47→  const [draggingIdx, setDraggingIdx] = useState<number | null>(null)
    48→  const [dragOverIdx, setDragOverIdx] = useState<number | null>(null)
    49→
    50→  function handleDragStart(idx: number) {
    51→    dragItem.current = idx
    52→    setDraggingIdx(idx)
    53→  }
    54→
    55→  function handleDragEnter(idx: number) {
    56→    dragOverItem.current = idx
    57→    setDragOverIdx(idx)
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  function handleDragEnd() {
    61→    if (dragItem.current !== null && dragOverItem.current !== null && dragItem.current !== dragOverItem.current) {
    62→      // Reorder orderedVisible, then map back to full columnOrder
    63→      const reordered = [...orderedVisible]
    64→      const [removed] = reordered.splice(dragItem.current, 1)
    65→      reordered.splice(dragOverItem.current, 0, removed)
    66→
    67→      // Rebuild full column order: preserve items not in orderedVisible at their positions,
    68→      // replace orderedVisible items with the reordered list
    69→      const orderedVisibleSet = new Set(orderedVisible)
    70→      const newOrder: string[] = []
    71→      let reorderIdx = 0
    72→      for (const name of columnOrder) {
    73→        if (orderedVisibleSet.has(name)) {
    74→          newOrder.push(reordered[reorderIdx++])
    75→        } else {
    76→          newOrder.push(name)
    77→        }
    78→      }
    79→      onSetColumnOrder(newOrder)
    80→    }
    81→    dragItem.current = null
    82→    dragOverItem.current = null
    83→    setDraggingIdx(null)
    84→    setDragOverIdx(null)
    85→  }
    86→
    87→  return (
    88→    <Popover width={300} position="bottom-end" shadow="md">
    89→      <Popover.Target>
    90→        <Button variant="default" leftSection={<Columns size={16} />}>
    91→          Columns
    92→        </Button>
    93→      </Popover.Target>
    94→      <Popover.Dropdown>
    95→        <Box style={{ maxHeight: 500, overflowY: 'auto' }}>
    96→          <Stack gap="md">
    97→            {groups.map((group) => (
    98→              <Box key={group.theme}>
    99→                <Text fw={600} fz="sm" mb="xs">
   100→                  {group.label}
   101→                </Text>
   102→                <Stack gap="xs">
   103→                  {group.fields.map((field) => {
   104→                    const isName = field.name === 'name'
   105→                    return (
   106→                      <Group key={field.name} gap="xs">
   107→                        <Checkbox
   108→                          label={field.label}
   109→                          checked={isName || visibleColumns.has(field.name)}
   110→                          disabled={isName}
   111→                          onChange={() => onToggleColumn(field.name)}
   112→                          size="sm"
   113→                        />
   114→                      </Group>
   115→                    )
   116→                  })}
   117→                </Stack>
   118→              </Box>
   119→            ))}
   120→
   121→            {orderedVisible.length > 0 && (
   122→              <>
   123→                <Divider />
   124→                <Box>
   125→                  <Text fw={600} fz="sm" mb="xs">
   126→                    Column Order
   127→                  </Text>
   128→                  <Stack gap={4}>
   129→                    {orderedVisible.map((name, idx) => {
   130→                      const field = fieldsByName.get(name)
   131→                      if (!field) return null
   132→                      const isDragging = draggingIdx === idx
   133→                      const isDragOver = dragOverIdx === idx && draggingIdx !== idx
   134→                      return (
   135→                        <Group
   136→                          key={name}
   137→                          gap="xs"
   138→                          justify="space-between"
   139→                          wrap="nowrap"
   140→                          draggable
   141→                          onDragStart={() => handleDragStart(idx)}
   142→                          onDragEnter={() => handleDragEnter(idx)}
   143→                          onDragEnd={handleDragEnd}
   144→                          onDragOver={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
   145→                          data-testid={`column-order-item-${name}`}
   146→                          style={{
   147→                            opacity: isDragging ? 0.5 : 1,
   148→                            borderTop: isDragOver ? '2px solid var(--mantine-color-brand-5)' : '2px solid transparent',
   149→                            cursor: 'grab',
   150→                            borderRadius: 4,
   151→                            padding: '2px 0',
   152→                          }}
   153→                        >
   154→                          <Group gap={4} wrap="nowrap" style={{ flex: 1, minWidth: 0 }}>
   155→                            <GripVertical size={14} style={{ flexShrink: 0, color: 'var(--mantine-color-dimmed)' }} />
   156→                            <Text fz="sm" truncate>
   157→                              {field.label}
   158→                            </Text>
   159→                          </Group>
   160→                          <Group gap={2} wrap="nowrap">
   161→                            <ActionIcon
   162→                              variant="subtle"
   163→                              size="sm"
   164→                              disabled={idx === 0}
   165→                              onClick={() => onReorderColumn(name, 'up')}
   166→                              aria-label={`Move ${field.label} up`}
   167→                            >
   168→                              <ArrowUp size={14} />
   169→                            </ActionIcon>
   170→                            <ActionIcon
   171→                              variant="subtle"
   172→                              size="sm"
   173→                              disabled={idx === orderedVisible.length - 1}
   174→                              onClick={() => onReorderColumn(name, 'down')}
   175→                              aria-label={`Move ${field.label} down`}
   176→                            >
   177→                              <ArrowDown size={14} />
   178→                            </ActionIcon>
   179→                          </Group>
   180→                        </Group>
   181→                      )
   182→                    })}
   183→                  </Stack>
   184→                </Box>
   185→              </>
   186→            )}
   187→          </Stack>
   188→        </Box>
   189→      </Popover.Dropdown>
   190→    </Popover>
   191→  )
   192→}
   193→
